DUAL-LICENSE MODEL

Built for the Community. Scaled for Enterprise.

NYX offers a Dual-License model: AGPL-3.0 for open-source community use and a Commercial License for proprietary SaaS, enterprise internal tools, and white-labeling. Secure your telemedicine, fintech, or government communications with our zero-knowledge architecture.

NYX is proudly open-source and free forever. However, if you are building a closed-source SaaS or internal corporate tool, you need a Commercial License.

THE AGPL-3.0 REALITY

The Open-Source Covenant

NYX is distributed under the AGPL-3.0 License. This is a strong copyleft license designed to prevent mega-corporations from taking open-source code, closing it up, and monetizing it without giving back.

If you modify NYX and run it as a public service (SaaS) over a network, you must release your modified source code to your users under the same AGPLv3 license.

Building Proprietary Software?

If your company policies prohibit open-sourcing your product, or if you wish to remove NYX branding, you are legally required to purchase a Commercial License.

COMPARE PLANS

Community vs. Enterprise

AGPL-3.0 (Community)
For individuals and open-source projects.
Commercial License
For proprietary SaaS and enterprise internal tools.
Full Zero-Knowledge Features Included Included
Source Code Requirement Must be Open-Source Keep it Closed-Source
White-labeling (Remove Logos) Not included Included
Priority Security Patches Not included Included
Direct Engineering Support Not included Included
View GitHub Contact Sales
ENTERPRISE USE CASES

Who Needs a Commercial License?

Telemedicine & Healthcare

Doctors and patients require absolute confidentiality. NYX provides a zero-knowledge communication layer with enterprise-grade security.

FinTech & Banking

Secure channels for high-net-worth clients or internal executive communications that must not leak.

Government & Defense

On-premise deployments with custom cryptographic primitives, completely disconnected from the public internet.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

How much does the Commercial License cost?

Pricing is customized based on your deployment scale (number of users) and specific SLA requirements. Contact us for a quote.

Do we get updates if we buy the Commercial License?

Yes. Commercial Licensees receive priority access to security patches and core updates before they are pushed to the public repository.

Can you help us deploy it on our AWS/Cloudflare infrastructure?

Yes, our Enterprise tier includes dedicated integration support and architecture consulting.

Ready to Secure Your Enterprise?

Reach out to discuss your specific requirements, custom integrations, or to acquire a Commercial License.

Contact Sales
